special_mechanics.name: Robot Movement in Battle
special_mechanics.description: During turn-based battles, the player's selected robot can move freely around the battlefield before attacking with equipped weapons

special_mechanics.name: ATB System with Movement
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based combat uses a gauge-based ATB (Active Time Battle) system where the player waits for gauges to fill before acting; after robot action, enemies take turns attacking

tier_notes: Tier 3: Robotrek is primarily an RPG with customizable robots as the combat system rather than player character movement. No precise physics parameters for character/robot movement are documented in available sources. Movement mechanics are limited to turn-based tactical positioning during battles rather than real-time physics-based movement.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Robotrek article (gameplay and mechanics description)
